feats_traits: Variant Human Traits: Resourceful, Skillful, Versatile
Feat: Fey Touched (Bane & Misty Step 1/long rest)
Sorcerer Origin: Eyes of the Dark
Sorcerer Origin: Strength of the Grave
Sorcerous Restoration (regain SP on short rest, 1/long rest)

raven_form.name: Raven Form
raven_form.description: Bonus Action: Transform into raven (1/short rest)

utility: Scarabeaus bug (alarm for danger on the expedition

sessions.Session 2:
Session: Session 2

Date: 13.11.2025

Notes:
Sitting on a desk in the class of Citaly.
Tmrw first expedition is announce: Calderen (newest ruin they found from the dawn forged),
 first ruin they found in the last five years.
Midnight menagerie tonight for students (near the dormitory?)
Tmrw at 6 o'clock sharp-->ready at the docks.
On the party: Madea drinks a nightowl espresso (southern temptation).
Starfall tea: makes you very clear in the head.

Calamity at  Blutquell Cyluviel comes to us and tells us he has news about the catastroph:

Witch fires, trembling of the earth, light, lone figure in black robe, man/ spirit born of the mountain.
Sorcery at places, necromancy-->witness tell of the dead standing up again and fighting against them.

From the Church of Shak'Asat: corpus Grimrock-->the name made whispering voices appear, everything
turned dark around them. Cursed name? A pupil who turned to necromancy. He has broken the
secret oath of the scholars. Decree: all who practice necromancy can legally be hunted down.

The dead rose again and people had to slay people they knew once. Blutquell seems to develop a
hate against everyone studying magic, not only necromancy.

The North is already thinking about becoming their own state. Now with the incident in Blutquell 
South blames the North even more.

Ramir and Madea have a heated discussion about the articles (Madea thinks they have the right to
be scared of magic now, while Ramil condemns the hatred in the articles).

Ramil tries to make amends befor turning to the dormitories but the discussion but they don't find
common ground.

Madea tries to read the journal of her mother in her bed at night:
Can't read the scribblings (foreign language)

Six sections:
1. Runes and weird stuff
2. sketches of dungeon entries
3. Rituals and diagramms
4. Wild scribbles
5. Weird maps
6. Listed names (some of them are crossed out)

Because of the night-owl espresso Madea can't sleep for hours (was awake till 4 in the morning)
In the morning she pays the price.

After 20 hours of traveling on a flying ship, we arrive in the south mountains called Kel Daren.
Citaly tells us he forgot something and boarded the ship and flew away.
We agree that this is probably a test.

We enter the ruin and the door closes behind us. Ivan (assistant of the prof) is there. We explore.
Madea recognizes a rune on a obelisk from the the journal of her mother (a circle with three vertica
and one diagonal line).
Ramil touches a sword of corpses (looking like dawn forged) and the ground breaks away, we fall,
land on a slope. Feel water.
We found ourselve in a room with a standing coffin enwrapped in chains, some of them glowing with
ember. The temperature is ice cold and hot at the same time. We landed in a lake or something and
go into the room.
Madea gets an uneasy burning sensation and feels dizzy.
Where the lake once was is now solid floor.
Ramil and Philiador open the coffin with stones and there is a skeleton inside with a metal globe,
which is extremly magic. Philiador touches the crystal thing (=world fragment) and we all get a 
vision of black clad soldiers, thousands of them, marching, corpses around them as they march. 
Soldier Madea will recognize everywhere...the ones who hunted her mother and her...and killed her.
Once we open our eyes again we found ourselves in a long hallway, with many doors, behind which
we hear our class camerads scream behind those doors. And have the dooming feeling that we have
freed a magic that was asleep for a very long time.
In the hallways different coffins are standing along the wall, imbued with hyroglyphes.
We have such a strong feeling that what just happened needs to stay a secret at all costs.
Philiador gets hit by an arrow (for stepping on a pressure plate) and when he falls down he hits two
more tiles. There also appears a mirror imagine of him.
Madea almost gets hit as well, but only her dress gets a scratch and the poison evaporates.
Philiador almost dies, they get saved by Ivan (the assistant) and their class mates all tell them they
have been missing for three days although for the main group it felt like three hours.
(At the end we get XP for finding a legendary artifact and get to level 4).
We fly back with Rusty Pete.
On her shoulder plate the black clad soldiers had a symbol (red and black) like a red sun. 
We come back to the school,in the school everyone is gathered (students and professor), at first 
we think its for us. But its the High Priest of the Church. To ensure safety and responsibility for the
realm. (looks like a angel)
Madea is happy that at least the church is here to keep an eye on the magic and ensure safety.
Her mother has never mentioned the church in either a good or a bad way. Madea new it excisted,
heard from it, but is pretty neutral against it.
Balar Osiriand and Falar and Talaf have declared independence against the Republic (the North).
The whole North wants to be independent.
All magic that destroys was forbidden. Anfauglith is the only exception (for research).
We are urged to write letters to our closest ones.
sessions.Session 3:
Session: Session 3

Date: 27th November

Notes: warm up from last session
Decree (Anordnung): a person seen practicing necromancy can be killed upon sight. (Decree of the church-->from last session)
Bad person-->Corvus Grimmrock
Northern provinces want to be independent
University got the face-less (High Priest of the Church)  got sent as a spokes person for the church or something

Start of session:
Madea wakes up to the magical artifact (the world fragment) hovering over her bed, just under the ceiling of her bed. She springs out of bed to wake Levinia in panic but once they rush back to Madeas bed it's gone and Levinia doubts  that Madea actually saw something and didn't just had a bad dream. The girls decided to still figure out more about the artifact they saw the day before. Madea feels a weird lingering of magic she felt before.

Manu Baba tells us we get the day free and have lunch at 12 am. And we have to choose a racer and a runner for the races.

Ramil and Kai come to our room and  Madea tells him about the artifact she saw. They all check their bed and no one finds something (kai thinks he saw a sword).
Madea opens up about having seen the soldiers from the  vision once before: while being hunted out of their home. She tells them how they killed her mother. But none of them have ever seen anything like the soldiers. Ramil wants to enjoy the outside sun and Madea is offended that he can think about relaxing when she just saw the orb. She storms out.

After she cooled down she went to the library she asked about books about armies and black clad soldiers. The library tells her she will find the book on the second floor and that two of her classmates already were here and asked about the books.
Levina and Ramil and Kai came behind her and asked about other things but they all get sent to the second floor.

On the third floor she sees every seat occupated except  the one on the table on which the faceless sits (the High Priest). Madea takes three promising books and sits to the table with them.
Student/staff names on the High Priests name: Cyuviel Orthon, dean of the university.
The High Priest saw Madea looking at his documents and scolds her, she is embarressed and tries to read her books, but the most promising one is written in old english, how she found out through a professor who was in the library as well (Panda professor) and he told her you learn to read old english in the second year (and all the professors can read it of course).

Madea has a talk with the faceless and asks how the Church stands towards the massacre of Blutquell and what they know about it. The faceless tells Madea to come seek him in the church of the school for answers and that he will see to it that something doesn't happen again.

Before heading to the lunch Madea passes by the post office and gets her letter from Abigail. But before she has time to read it she has to run to lunch to not be late.
Kai, Ramil, Levina, Philiador? and her have a lunch with the dean (second highest).
After lunch she reads the letter in her room and sheds some tears about the encouracing words of her dearest friend but is also worried about her warnings about the University. Abigail remainds her to trust the emperor and the church who want to control magic.

Ramil and Duneon get Madea  in her room and tell her that her classmates all meet in the tea room to discuss the runner and racer for the tournament.
The tea room is above the herb room. Madea feels at  home and asks if there is a job for her since it reminds her of home.

Levina gets decided as the racer (one in the whole year), and Madea as the runner (kind of the obstacle cours where magic can be used), one in each class gets chosen.

Madea then heads to the school church to meet the faceless to ask him more about the incident in Blutquell and how the Church thinks to protect the people from it never happening again.
Madea had a very unnerving conversation with the High Priest. She was hoping for reassurance in the eyes of the darkness of magic but she got an uneasy feeling as he not only condemned  necromancy but also every kind of magic that hurts others (fire and eyes magic etc.) and she noticed that she would fall under this category and was starting to think the church was fanatic. Also the High priest was interested in the name of Madeas mother which made her uneasy as she doesn't know but always had the feeling that maybe her mother also practiced some not so allowed magic sometimes.
sessions.Session 4:
Session: Session 4

Date: 9.12.2025

Notes:  The girls get waken up by Ivan who tells them that they have to attend a ceremony of the faceless before their first class in the morning.
They all walk to the chapell. Their is a  weird fresc like the Michelangelo (golden hand on top with a red apple and the lower hand is a figure dressed in the robes of the faceless, seems to glow although its fabric). Also some Menorahs.
The faceless is behind the altar with a black book with a golden ingraving and a sun on it. Seems to glow as well.  Almost seems like the sun is moving on the cover.
In the front row the dean (dragonborne) is sitting there. Made joins Kai who reserved his class some seats in the second  row.
The faceless just said that if one is ever burdened he has an open ear.

They have Archeomancy with Professor Citaly (just in the room next to the chapel). Announcement of a new expedition.
Citaly assured us that as long as one wears the robes we can use magic outside of Atherion (without breaking any law).

The second expedition brings them to the three pillars near Hagendorf. The village were Madea has been many times before in her childhood. Massive cristals. Under Landrot there is a massive dawn forged city and some canals go to the cristals and they were pushed up. So we know they were put there but we don't really know why yet. Often the power source of magical artifacts. 
"Eldalie"

They touch the glittering water of the river beside the cristals. In the shade of a tree and out of sight of the others Madea takes of her glove and puts her hand into the water, scared to rot something. And fills up two of the vials with water from the river. When her left hand touches the water it feels soothing. Pleased and intrigued Madea plans to find out more about the abilities of the water.
They go to the cristal. Climb up the stairs to the top. Little plattform there.
When Madea touches the cristal it absorbs their magic (shown through a dark shadow in the cristal), feels soothing but not too good for Madea. It amplified a spell of Kai.

In the evening they go to Hagendorf. Small market in the middle, merchant village. Bad weather, seems like a storm is starting to brew. Mist in the air. A little windy. Their professor told them to go into the village and try to help the people there.

Massacre at Hagendorf while were there. Regina and Duneon dead. We get picked up by Citaly and in the distance we see that Landrot, Grimmfels, Hagendorf ad Hallow Anwesen were also attacked.
Madea writes a letter to Abigail in Godrick praying that the village was not attacked.

In the great hall of Atheorien everyone gathers and Brandsson gives a speech and honours the sacrifice of Duneon and Regina. The faceless stands still, everyone else is sitting. Tom stands up and starts to sing (he's in the harmonic club)-->they sing a mixture of dawn forged and orgish (eldalie).

WTF. Levinia suddenly feels something under her robe during the singing when she looks she sees the artifact (world fragment) under her robe the inner ring now red instead of copper. And Levina feels that if she pulls the energy from it, she can see through some memory that was tampered with. And suddenly she sees all clearly: Duneone never existed. She was a zombie/undead all along. She was controlled by a puppeteer or something. Levina didn't tell anyone yet though.
sessions.Session 5:
Session: Session 5

Date: 13th January 2026

Notes: we find ourselves in the boys dormitory. The world fragment in the room inner two rings are red. The last two weeks are a blurr for us. We can't remember why we are in the room right now. Madea can't seem to remember Duneone. All standing in a circle.  After trying to get through to the artifact Madea suddenly can through the magic and remembers her . All remember her now. Tom comes to get them, he doesn't seem to remember  Duneone. They go to Celuviel who tells them the news.
News read by Celuviel:
Emergency chancellor appointed, it's the emperor (highest figure in the senate, and has emergency executive authority). Chancellor Eonix. He coordinated a force "protection of civilians" main part assembling in Udun (right on the map).
Grimmfell is about to starve? Whole of Nurnen. Grimmfell and Landrot had a supply route which was severed by the North. The North has officially attacked Nurnen (the South).
They go to the classroom of Artefactology. Golden skeleton of a animal hanging on the ceiling.
Strongest artefacts are from the dawn forged, haven't figured out how they got them that potent. Two main group of artifacts: the conscious and the unconscious. The conscious are rarer because they kinda controll their magic.
Further distinctions.
Harmful conscious artifacts= cursed artifacts (prohibited on university grounds unless accompagned by a professor).
Lehrstreit about the university itself if it is a conscious or an unconscious artifact. Our professor thinks its conscious (she hears the walls speaking to her) but  most scholars think of it as unconscious.
An artifact is created by a master and the artifact is a servant. The master inflict its will on the artifact.
Sometimes an artifact cannot hold all of the magic and the magic has to be split up in more than one artifacts.
The mightier the spell the more space it takes up in an artifact. Like literal space. Meteor shower is the mightiest spell but not even the castle would be enough. But the dawn forged have found a way/technique with the splitting of the magic to more artifacts. With that you can use two small artifacts with a link to carry meteor shower. To infuse an object with magic you need star cristalls (the pillers are star cristalls). It's called chaining artifacts together. The dawn forged were able to connect up to five artifacts together. Our university only ever managed three last year. They don't know how the dawn forged did it.
0.1 star cristal.
After class in the corridor we find a new room that appeared and wasn't there before. Philiador is standing inside of it.
The room has a wooden table inside, it looks old as is it has a story. Pristine wood. El Daher wood apparently. From an old tree that lived in Atheorien 10'000 years old. It was felled. Four candles with different stages of beeing burned down. All are lit but it seems as if the wax would not melt. It has one window. It has a book shelve, high and old but empty. No dust. A wooden boxwith a lock and a key inside of it. There is a lock pile and Madea takes one and throws it in the fire. The embers form the word "Welcome". With every piece of wood madea throws into the fire she gets an answer to her question. She asked who she is talking to and gets the answer "the-in-between". It doesn't answer the question if it is a conscious artefact. Its the  room apparently who is called the in between and it is there for thoughts and  secret discussions? Almost like the room of requirements kinda?
The boys storm in after they were sneaking into the artefact classroom and Ramil has stolen one artefact. 
Madea explains the fire-mechanics to the others. All start to ask questions. We're the only ones who have access. Apparently the professors knew about the room in the early times but apparently not anymore. The room remembers Catlin, but said she was never a formal student.
They find a bag in a chest and find out that it is connected. If you put something in the bag it'll appear in the chest and vice versa.
Apparently the world fragment reacts to other artifacts, the closer it gets the brighter it gets. When the boys search for the place where its the brightest they get to Madea. It seems to react to Madea and a burning sensation in her chest whenever she touches it.
Ramil touches the world fragment and gets cursed (radiant damage). He feels Madeas chest (no not like that an Arcana check) and it feels just like the world fragment.
Everyone is now suspicious why Madea is artefactlike and why she has a weird heart beat, slow and weird???
Ramil casts identified on Madeas chest...he gets cursed as well, but sees that Madea has a second world fragment in the form of a heart. And its the reason why she's alive. And scares  inside but not seen on the outside. It was put in there artifically. She was not born with it.  And somethings tells to "protect us".
We meet in the main entrance of the university with Atsur Brandson. He tells us that the races and runs will start in two weeks. In artiomancy and artefactology we will have exams in three weeks. In also three weeks its christmas.
Underground floors: 1st  underground archives
2nd hot springs
3rd breeding grounds for Aeorodons?
We have to go and bond with a Aeorodon and prepare it for the races/runs.
We arrive at the breeding spots, no railing, cliffs. Aeorodons look like a gigantic owl but fluffy and dragonlike. We meet a tinman like man (Raknar Jörvason, Chef- und Reisekoch) makes music for the Aerodons.
Aeorodons are very open and kindhearted species, they age similarly to us. Connection for life.
Approaching: make eye contact when it looks at you, if it comes closer we do a back and forth and put down the head till our fronts touch. They like sardins
Madea spots an Aeorodon that is dark blue with white patterns and black throat and yellow eyes.
Madea bonds with it and calls it Nox. Madea thinks "let's go Nox" and Nox goes into a dive off the cliff. Madea holds on for dear life. Madea sees dragons as she flies through the clouds with her Aeorodon. We all glide along with Atsur Brandson. Tom has a red Aerodon with yellow feathers and has no control. They end their first flight. Levina and Madea get reminded to practice often for the races/runs. Nox is described as a little bit of a diva oh boy. Nox is male btw. It's always different obstacles you can't really prepare.
Madea goes somewhere quiet to write a letter to Abigail and to figure more out about the situation in Nurnen.
sessions.Session 6:
Session: Session 6 (Ramil, Philiador Madea special)

Date: 25th January 2026

Notes: While the others were discovering more about Catlin Duneone Madea spent her day writing a letter to Abigail and training with Nox for the run and also  have some talks with the faceless. She tries to  gain his favour. She doesn't agree with his views and thinks him dangerous but she thinks it a better action to try and act as if she's on his side and play a loyal pet to him.
She later finds out that Philiador and Tom had terrible encounters with him.   Phil even has a scar à la  Umbridge on his wrist, the words written on it are "sinner"
Madea also went on to study the notebook of her mother.
Runes
Dungeons
Rituals
Notes
Weird maps
Names (crossed out) Madea feels like one or two names could have been the same as the one on the list of the faceless.
Dungeons and weird maps describe the same place a cave that Madea remembers from her childhood south of Rabenhall in the hills. There seems to be a big cave system and the cave from her memory and in the notebook has staffs and skulls depicted with it.
Phil and Ramil tell Madea, that they found a book in the library that shouldn't have been there, signed by Unnamed who romanticises and explains how to do Necromancy. A handwritten note in it, suggest to visit a cave near Rabenhall for answers. They think it's the same cave Madea  remembers from her childhood.
Ramil has a visit at the morgue and discovers Duneons body. She did in fact exist, but died over a year ago and was probably reanimated and had a dark star crystall imbued in her neck. So someone with access to the morgue must have reanimated her.
They all update each other and want to go investigate the caves. Levina and Madea are suddenly affected or corrupted? by the artifacts (Levina  through the artefact we found and  Madea through the one in her chest).
They are absoultely adamant about bringing the artefact to the cave.
Levina and Madea go to Brandson. Brandson allows Madea to go to the forests of Nurnen with the whole class to mourn her mothers dead.
They fly away with their Aerodons. They see the war raging on flying over the landscape.
They stay at Madeas home in the wood after a days flight. She sees her mothers room with etched in words of "witch, burn in hell". Madeas room is burned completly. The windows are broken in, clearly some people randalized it. Madea goes to her herb garden and everything is overgrown, she picks some useful herbs and goes back. In a tree she sees a black arrow. She tries to remove it but is not strong enough. Frustrated she punches the tree and sinks down on it. Crying. Her Aerodon joins to comfort her.  After a while she turns back and joins the other.
 The others explained everything to Kai who was not yet in the loop.
The next morning they find the cave with the skulls on a spike. Madea remembers her mother brought herbs and a tome in her memory of that cave of the childhood.
Big tome, chain to close it, golden inscription.
In the cave they take the right path. Big room, big wall, brighter than the rest, seems like there is something written on it.
They all cast illuminate and find a gigantic panting on the wall. Real gold was used. There is a godess like women on the right and people raise their weapons against her. On the left there is a dark pharao like figure casting a curse on her. Could the people be dawn forged?
Madea tries to draw it in her mothers notebook.
sessions.Session 7:
Session: Session 7

Date: 22th February 2026

Notes:
In the cave there are holes in ceiling (25m in the air) the painting in front and doors on the right and left.
Citaly is suspicious because he was the only one who had access to the morgue (and all the other top tier deans and headmasters of the school).
They hear something in the caves and suddenly a fight begins. It looks like insect like crabs or roaches. They are rachnes? They count as beasts and not animals. They have a leader the queen, her generals are called mothers. We're facing mothers. It's a hive mindset. The holes in the walls are probably from them and means were near a nest. Every rachne gets a certain mission upon birth and we are also facing archer and warrior and worker rachnes. They all came from the floor and it's an ambush. They start fighting.
Ramil gets knocked out by the mothers, a lot of the other beasts get kill and the others flee.
After the fight Ramil is blind and deaf due to a last attack of the mother. Madea makes him a concoction from the cristal water of the pillars with some herbs. He is instantly healed and gets all spells back and feels energized and alive. 
They proceed through the door on the left where they hear wind. They find a hanging bridge à la squid game were they have to go across. Madea goes first and falls but turns into a raven.
Walking across: right, left right, left, left, jump, left, right, jump, right, left, left. Ramil gets across with a robe (on the other side is Kai and Phil holding him if he falls), Levina turns in to a bat and they all get across. Madea manages to open the door as a raven. Behind the door is long floor full of rubber. There is a treasure chest but the party suspects it's a mimic (creature that poses as an object to lure people in). Madea flies past it and finds a  corridor with metal  bars. Not even as a raven can she get past it. In another room is a riddle on a wall it is a mirror riddle which Madea can solve instantly but she can not put the plate on the right place because she is a raven. She waits for Ramil and Levina who help her. A narrow small corridor opens and they crouch in and find another door. It has dispel magic on it and they enter it.
There is a room with a stone centry (dormant and indistructable) and a table with six chairs and a set table with six chalice with similar but different liquids.
Under the chairs something is written:
Sentry= seargent 
Levina= major
Madea= captain
Ramil= leutnant
Phil= deputy
Kai= chief

They had to drink the cups in the right order (lowest to highest, the sentry started)
They manage and another  small hallway opens. They crouch through
Another riddle: "Don't forget three is right and you will find the light"

They enter a square room with four doors on each wall. One has a  candle beside, one has a book with the title "light" and, one has a morning star,  and the last has a sun etched into it.

They enter the door on the right side were a hallway carries on. In all the other doors there is a equal square room with exactly the same interior as the first.
The party follows the hallway. They find a small room with another hallway leading out and a big double door which is closed.
Mentichor is written over a door.
MANTICORE: the solution is that the door itself (which was speaking) has to say Manticore.
They can enter and are suddenly in  a very fancy mansion.  Once they enter suddenly behind them is a goblin  on a gigantic frog: Skarsnik Catacoomb and the frog gumbo
The mansion is called tzentch manor.
They rest in a room.
They follow the frog guy into a room with two portraits. One says lord Grimmrock with a pest  mask and the other "Matriarch Blackthorn"...also with a mask. Madea is thunder struck. Maybe a relative. 
The butler leads us to the "dinner" with the matriarch.
There is a gigantic table with a lot of chairs. On the head and the chairs right beside it is the only cutlery.
The Matriarch enters, like on the portrait, but with a human face, young, not much older than Madea.
"I was expecting you". She is 205 years old and is Madeas great-grand-mother.
Blackthorn is the leading family of the grand witch covent. The devout followers Tzeentch. So the Blackthorns are all witches. The Matriarch tells her that her mother maybe didn't tell Madea about the Matriarch because she was trying to protect her from her destiny.
Madeas a letter of her mother in which she explains a prophecy of a stillborne child and her role as a future Matriarch.
The  Matriarch says the one on the left is Nagash on the big portrait. 
Lord Grimmrock is the leader of the mortuary cult. One of the five faces of the many faced gods.

The Matriarch kills herself with the comment that Madeas time has come now. She turns into ashes and only ashes and the mask of the Matriarch remains. Madea gets the mask and can wear it (it's an item).  
They convince Skarsnik to lead  them into the office.

They roam around in the office.
They found a document that the mortuary cult sent something to the grand witch covent. WF (world fragment)  highly volatile. It was a Lieferservice of magical artifacts.

 Carthian Family seal. The emissary who delivered it is Mr. Al-Saif. Ramil thinks it was his uncle Malikir. He was involved with the trades of artifacts.
There are some letters which only can be read with the Martriarchs mask: a contract between the Martriarch and Corvus Grimmrock. The witches from the grand witch covenant will search for the left eye and the left hand of Nagash in exchange that the mortuary cult gave the witches a world fragment. It was already given to the Carthian family. (contract was already fulfilled by giving the WF to the Carthian family who transports the artifact and Al-Saif helped to deliver it. But no proof that it was actually delivered). 24 years ago.
They find the tome of her mother she saw in her memories.  Levina find it in the office. Ramil senses divine magic in the book. A weird kind of magic but not like Shak'Asat magic. It's a religious textbook. More like a choir book for the many faced god. And there are five chapters for the five faces:
-Nurgle: god of life and disease
-Slaanesh:  godess of longing and hatred
-Morvath: god of death and memory
-Chorne: god of war and love
-Tzeentch: god of science and lies (we follow that dude the witches)

Skarsnik tells Madea that she can only get in contact with other surviving witches of the convent through the rituals. There is a pentagramm on the floor and  a corpse with a corrupted star cristall around her neck. Skarsnik said it is so the witches can talk to Corvus.

Many witches died at Blutquell. It seems as if the covent was betrayed by the mortuary cult.
The previous Martriarch was staying here a lot.
One of the grand witches were  called to a gathering in Blutquell a and almost all of them died. So it seems like it was a setup.
They find a button near the door and some cristalls drop from the wand. They are numbered.
Madea touches one and feels like her mind goes through a tunnel to another cristall. She hears voices. She hears "Abigail go down here we need to hide".
Madea faints and gets caught by Ramil. Skarsnik tries to cure her with cheese and the smells gets her awake.
Skarsnik leads them to a back excit (without traps and stuff). They get out on a river in the cave where they started.
They run out. They find Tom circled by Aerodons all sleeping. Madea begs them to go save Abigail.
They take off. From high in the sky they see Rabenhall in flames and Grimmfells in ashes. The forest of Nurnen is burning as well.
Madea runs to the hut and sees three horses. She storms in and sees Abigail, her mother and her father on the table injured badly. They embrace each other and Madea tries to heal him with pillar water.
Once the father is stabilized Madea and Abigail head out to talk. The troupes from the emperor tried to defend Godrick. They tried to evacuate and hold the town as long as possible. The attacking troupes used magic and were from the north.
Abigails tells Madea they plan to stay in her hut if it's fine by Madea because the armies just try to take the big towns and cities and they find it safer to stay in Nurnen.
Madea gets a letter from Atsur Brandson (condolences and that he will pick them up).
Levina wants to share something with the group: her uncle was in the senate (extremy high position) her sister has written a letter to her.
The north didn't want to attack but they stationed troups near Hagendorf but they were not planned to attack. But someone gave the order to attack. Her uncle was sent to the South to talks things out but disappeared on the way.
In order to save face the North then went with the attack and took responsibility for it . But in reality they do not know who actually gave the order. Levinas sister wants her to show a declaration of the Northern command in the school, so everyone knows the truth. It basically tells that Arche Mage Aaren is the leader in the North to represent etc.
Arche Mage Savos Aaren one of the most famous wizards of all time has taken the lead in the North.
So almost the same as the South who gave all the powers to the Chancellor. It was a legitimate transfer of power in the North and in the South by the democratic parties? Or the council. Levinas father has a spying network. But they still don't know who gave the order. Conrad was the first in command? But doesn't seem to match the description Levina gave of the one leading the attack. The whole army belongs to her father. Adelfa is the name of Levina.
Tom joins the group and tells them he got a letter: his brother was sent into the battle field, he's from the North (balar) and his brother will sail to Arvenien. Philiador is from there and is shocked that Toms brother is supposed to circle Nirndorf?
sessions.Session 8:
Session: Session 8

Date: 11th March 2026

Notes: We wake up in the tree house and  get picked up  by Brandson.
Rusty Peet is on the flying ship.  We have been gone for 4 days. Brandson tells us there is a lot of disussion in the school about the war.
Apparently Anastasia was a student at the university and Brandson was some years ahead from her but knew her.
Brandson is very sus and wants to fly over Blutquell (detour) to check some things.
They see Blutquell all in ashes, the ground still glowing from the embers.
New method of magic: dark matter with super fast velocity (eldrice blast) . The north is using it (three mages at a time directing it as a flow).
Battle mages from Balar have reached the front.  Nurnen is half  occupied, the North keeps marching forward.
The fight is in action. Battle mages completly  destroying the opposition.
Almost all of Galen is fallen, only Landrot remains. They then want to enter the grand caves of Talimar and the old mountain road of Lomin to get even further to Orodreth and Emeldir.
The North elected Zavos Aaren  to command the North (he saved the peope during the crooked moon).
Apparently an assembly should happen  in the university.
Anastasia focus on arcane biology and Brandson was the first year assistant (sus is he my father)
Madeas mother was in the  college of harmonics.
Brandson plays for her on a grand piano (he wanted to surprise them during the funeral  but too much was happening).
The dean is holding an assembly in the big hall: he received two letters (I think south and north leaders) the university (Atherion) should break its neutrality and choose a side. New policy is established. We will visit the towns as guards for peace. We should guard as a neutral party and bear the mark of Atherion under what we should be protected. If we are attacked we have every right  to protect ourselves. Unprovoked killing will be punished equal to necromancy. Death penalty (god damn).  New lessons for battle field survival etc. Objections to the magistrate.
We go to our class room.
On the way there the faceless  appears behind Philiador "I'm assuming this is for you" he's giving him a letter with a stamp from the family of Cathien. And Philiador seems really scared.
They sit down in the classroom. 
Apparently both sides agreed that they will not attack and only see us as protecters of peace.
"Mapacus?" Brandson casts the map.
The South is gathering on the passages in preparation for the armies of the South. The North is also cutting of the ship trades around Arvenien.
We have Artifactology: we learn   about memory images. The Kiraa'Ai that lived in Atherion before us have used those artifacts. It takes a  picture of a memory and puts it on a canvas. It can also capture a whole scene (basically a camera?). Takes more than one year to learn how it will really works. They go to the art gallery in the first floor. We have to figure out which ones are  image memories and which ones aren't (if you feel something magical). And then we can enter the memory if we discover one. There are some memories you're not allowed to enter.
Picture: plain of torment. A mage that went insane-->the mad scholar. It's not allowed to enter it. Levina found the painting. 
Madea finds one with flying islands. It's called: the memory of the discovery of Atherion.
She finds herself in the body of a mage who discovered Atherion (his name is also Atherion) and he rode on a unicorn (they are now excting).
Gladius the defender is the next image  we could enter. Was during the last crooked moon . We all enter. We're in a strong body of a woman in an armor. The moon has a nose and  seemed washed out. She has a helmet and we feel how she stabs a monster with a speer and a lightning  from the speer. It's near a coast. Everything seems greyish because of the moon. Apparently the crooked moon takes about a year.
The devastation of Sirion: picture of a big dragon towering over armies and armies of men. Three hundret years ago. He destroyed all of the towns in Anfauglith (that's why today there aren't any towns anymore). They didn't realise the scale of this big creature. We can experience dragon fire there. Entering the painting you're a demon lady with three arms. Mages around her are throwing speers of ice. The dragons raises it's head and spits fire the fire reaches the mages, a shield protects them and the memory disipates.
Ramil tries to enter the picture with a corrupted star cristal from Catlins body.
He enters the dragon picture but through the corrupted cristal he lands inside of the painting as himself. As the dragon fire roars over him Ramil gets thrown out with a lot of burn marks.
The professor   of artefactology heals him with an old method from Elmir and brings him to Zhasargo.
On picture: the old emperor the self proclaimed king of Balar.
Madea enters it and Kai binds a rope on her leg and tries to join, but the rope gets cut.
She 's in the shoes of the emperor and fights against the king. The emperor casts a spell the king froze and then the emperor split him into thousand pieces with an axe. 
In the hospital Jh'azargo heals Ramil and Ramil also asks him if he knows something against curses (from the time he tried to touch Madeas heart-artifact) he also gets a sand  in a vial that he should eat when he's about to get engulfed by fire (again).
Two pictures:   portal looking place. It seems like a witch  gathering. It's a worship of Tzeentch. Madea recognized that she is in the body of her grandmother (she hears the voice) and sees that  the guy on the front is about to get sacrificed.
Another picture Ossiriand: Kai enters the picture. He's riding on a horse, sending firebolts from his hand, screaming. He is a dwarf. 
Ramil comes back right after class has ended and explain his star cristal had a fracture. After some recounting he has convinced the professor that it was not his fault at all. Celuviel wants to fight for the South against the North. And he's from a family of soldiers and sees it as honorable to die in battle. Celuviel  likes the faceless.  Philiador snaps at Kai for adoring the faceless.
Celuviel and Ramil talk about the war. Ramil says they have to look closer while Celuviel just sees that the North attacked unprovoked. Celuviel storms off and calls them all North-sympathizers.
The girls go to sleep.
In the mean-time Ramil goes back to Jh'Zargo to get his curses removed and they discover the curses were put in his memory. He proceeds to cut open his head (damn). And Jh'Zargo tells him that Ramils oncle had a house in Orodreth (asien country) which Ramil didn't know.
Splits open the skull, Ramil stays awake.  Jh'Zargo gets a corrupted cristal from somewhere in his office. Hangs it over Ramil with a liquid that spills into his brain.  Ramil gets into a trance and sees a vision of the artifact and hears Jh'Zargo in his head. He has to destroy the diseased area of his brain. He casts identify on the world fragment. But apparently it's not the real world fragment but only a memory of it, since that is all his brain could contain. Two and a half rings are glowing. 
 He destroys the two curses in his memory. He gets stitched together or something. 
Jh'Zargo gives him a really strong alcohol that heals him completly. He could not comprehend the magic behind the artifact. A conscious artifact the world fragment.
Jh'Zargo asks Ramil to have lunch with him and his class tomorrow. He has always been eating alone.
Apparently the first time Ramil was with Jh'Zhargo he saw a student that was surrounded by a lot of professors. Ramil asked about it again, but Jh'Zargo said he cannot talk about it but she was called Jennifer and was hanged because of necromancy last week. 
Madea sits in her bed and  scams through the book they found in the office of the Blackthorn manor but it's in a language she cannot read. She only knows it 's about the many faced God.

They wake up the next morning.  But the guys do all the fun stuff and the girls do nothing. The end.
They all meat for lunch. Jh'Zargo introduces himself as the head surgeon. Jh'Zargo learned magic in Emeldir once where he met the family of nomades (Al-Saif). His oncle was working with artifacts and researching star cristals and how they can heal. Apparently the water from the cristalls causes depression if drunk too often. That's why they don't often make potions with it. We should visit him in the hospital just for fun.  
Ramil asks about healing potions but apparently we'll learn it in Archeology.
sessions.Session 9:
Session: Session 9

Date: 25th March 2026

Notes: They get woken up by Atsur Brandson. They have five minutes to meet in the main hall.
They have fucking exams. Surprise exams. 
Professor Al Fares: she will ask us seven questions.
Q1: a cursed artifact is evil and hurtful towards other people. It's also concious.
Q2: Natural occuring star cristalls near Hagendorf village.
Q3: A master hast to inbue an object with magic making it its servant. The bigger the spell the bigger the object has to be
Q4:Star cristal. We have one in the strenght 0.1
Q5:the university just managed to chain 3 together.
 
20+4=24
16+4=20

Second test: Zeichnen (einer blind, einer taub, einer stumm)
Brandson comes again
Today is christmas eve we will visit Baldersheim in Ossiriand. Levina and Madea are squad  leaders since the aerodons races are suddenly  discontinued with the current situation. We will later go to Nurnen and Galen as peacekeepers.
Squad of Madea: Ramil, Tom and Philiador.
We flied without any incident.
Some rules for Baldersheim: be civil, no trouble with anyone, no war talk, stealing is not possible (magical barriers in the shops)
Apparently there is a carnival and we can make money there.
We see the northern lights. The Northerner believes that the Aurora Borealis is the path of a dragon . The dragon can be seen almost touching the earth on christmas eve. So this night. Departing souls should join the dragon.
Looks like a little magical Grindelwald. Carriges drawn by big ice bears.
First Brandson wants to go listen to a storyteller with the class. The storyteller is called Yoor and was the predecessor of Citaly and a scholar.
We should not interact with the guards apparently.
He's wearing an old cloak from Atherion, he has a long white beard, small nose, deep eyes and eye bags, he's an elf and he looks pretty old, olive green skin-->Storyteller. He has a big tome called the book of stories.

He tells us a story from another place and time: "The Queen and her devoted pupil"
Queen of unmatched briliance, ruled her land prosperly. Turned her gaze inwards to find the truth. At her side stood a devoted pupil. Unwavering loyalty. She searched for wisdom. Queen uncovered an old formular. To touch minds, a hidden pulse, a current beneath all living things. The power to command and shape. The world can be guided. She wanted to perfect the world. While the pupil stept into the silence, and found stillness, from there he drew his own knowledge: free from all bonds. While the Queen wanted to bind the world.
They clashed. Ideas turned to conflicts and division.  
The normal people managed to stop Queen as well as pupil. Now only fragments remain. Stories, whispers etc. If such a choice came again, would we choose differently (is this about the  portrait in the cave).

The storyteller claims to have found this story in an old cave of the dawn forged.
Madea goes to talk to him with Ramil
He knows a Al-Saif from his school time.   In a cave further south in Nurnen. He says the cave was the exact same one we were in. Apparently the writing on the floor can only be seen with a moon stone. The pupil was the first necromancer ever. He could not be touched by the story. The entities were not divine creatures but just normal dawn forged from their time. Archeomancy (cultures, ruins).
In the jungle beautiful tower, and in Arvenien a wonderful cave. Ossiriand big big big head sculpture.
They ask about the crooked moon and he explains it's like a moon phase. They change every year (there are about 20  or 30 different ones and the last crooked moon was 20 years or something around). The next will be in our last school year. The yearly moon phase influence the emotions of people and the crooked moon brings out the worst in people, hatred. And that's why a lot of wars happen in that time. To the question if he ever knew a pupil called Grimmrock he starts to leave and evade. But he apparently never heard of the Blackthorns (rude).
They wander over the carnival. 

The boys go to a big wheel were there is a person chained to, and they have to throw knifes at him. They win if they do not hit the guy three executive times.
Healing potions: green to red
Madea buys a lot of magical scrolls

Dancing light
Light
Guidance 5x
Mending 2x
Prestidigitation
minor illusion 3x
fire bolt 5x
eldritch blast 5x
Resistance 5x
Ray of frost 5x
Shoking grasp 3x

36 silver
Ramil gives 3x Restistance

After shopping spree, Levina sees a beaten up dog, talks to him and lets him lead us to his owner. In a basement (very suspicious) we see a treasure and it's a mimic with a heart beat and also the dog turns out to be a mimic.
They fight against it and loot money, a shield , an amber and a jade.

Then we head to the shade at the end of town. There we hear a creepy whisper from the inside that sounds like an incantation.
Ramil casts invisibility and tries to sneak inside and sees:  someone laying on the floor (he just sees the feet) and in a black cloth and a Pestmaske and he dances and casts. The person on the floor is dead. Ramil sees the necromantic ritual and runs out  dragging Madea with him

Suddenly it gets deadly quiet, the ritual stops and the door opens. Outside steps professor Citaly. The students get a terrible headache and realize that he looks kinda dead.
But he talks normally with  the students asking them what they are doing here and that its time to return.
Ramil stays back (invisible) and checks the shed. There are Brandspuren and signs of a ritual. Ramil confirms that Citaly was the corpse he saw and not the one conjuring or holding the ritual.
Baldurs eve christmas eve. We go back to the banquet hall of the city.
The class asks Brandson and Jhzargo for an important talk.

Before they get to it, Citaly storms to Brandson for a very important message. Madea sends Brandson a message to tell him that they saw Citaly involved in a necromantic ritual. Brandson acts like he didn't hear anything. 
Brandson comes back from his talk with Citaly and wants to talk with the class.
Citaly said that we were involved in a necromantic ritual.
Brandson tells us that we have to have to go in front of a trial to proof our innocence.
Jhzargo tells us that a stone creature absorbs things put into his body, just as a corrupted star cristal. So after some days it won't be seen anymore.
We still go up to watch the Aurora Borealis and see the dragon in the distance. Leading theory that the dragon protects this world from the stuff beyond (astral plains ). Tom tells them he has their back, just as Jhzargo and the rest. They will all try to prove their innocence together.
They go back to the ship. They're flying close to the Aurora Borealis . So close that they can touch it. Madea holds her star cristal into it,  it fills itself up but as soon as she lowers it, it empties. Brandson says that it is too pure to fill a star cristal. The northern lights are directly from the weave. They need emotions to catch it.
Back in the doorm university they get in with some protective wall. A lot of professor and the dean all now about the accusations now. And tomorrow the trial will take place.
In the same dorm of the boys the world fragments appears again, the third ring glowing a little.
Philiador hears "find the third piece" (meaning the third artifact).
Madea touches it and hears the same "find the rest of me". It becomes invisible  but the faint glow remains, swirling aroung our heads.
We feel a knew leaver in their minds: suddenly getting a new power. We feel like we can (one time per day) we have the powers to do the spell "mind control". When we cast this, we summon the world fragment piece to us, to do the spell for us. We know that it is radiant magic.
Philiador casts it on Ramil: Ramil feels like whiplashes against his mind and waves of energy. He takes 25 HP psychic damage. Philiador could give him one command. In his subconcious Ramil feels from a birds perspective a black sea. Realizing its rows of rows of black clad soldiers. Leading them is a golden person.  The spell ends, Philiador also gets 18 psychic damage for casting. But they can't drop under 1 HP.
Kai casts mind control on Madea. She also sees the same vision as Ramil. Being lead by a beauty in gold.
The Queen uncovered something ancient: something to touch the mind within. The pulse of the world and the possibility to shape, command.

characters.Regina Amber: Died in the battle of Hagendorf. Was an half orc.
characters.Catlin Duneon: Died at the battle of Hagendorf.
characters.Jeany Wright: Her eyes are covered up, has six arms, is our captain for our first excursion.
characters.The High Priest of the Church:
Introduced himself as the faceless.
He kinda looks like a dark angel. And is installed in the university permanently now.
characters.Manu Baba:
Third year dean or  something
Third year assistant of Citaly
characters.Skarsnik:

Gumbo is his frog

Accompanies us to Ossiriand

places.Kel Daron:
